paper_title: UHPLC-ESI-HR-MS Analysis and Data Processing for Metabolomic Profile

methods.description: This method describes the process of using a Waters Acquity I-class UPLC system coupled with a PDA Detector and a VION IMS-qTOF for metabolomic profiling. The analysis is performed using electrospray ionization in positive mode to detect wavelengths from 190-500 nanometers.

steps.description: The UPLC-HR-MS analysis was done using a Waters Acquity I-class UPLC system coupled to a PDA Detector and a VION IMS-qTOF, using electrospray ionization (ESI) in positive mode.
steps.searchable_summary: perform UPLC-HR-MS analysis using Waters Acquity I-class UPLC system with ESI in positive mode

steps.description: Chromatographic separation was performed with a BEH C18 1.7 µm (2.1 × 100 mm) column maintained at 40°C.
steps.searchable_summary: perform chromatographic separation using BEH C18 column at 40°C

methods.description: This method involves processing the data obtained from UPLC-HR-MS analysis using UNIFI software and dereplicating selected peaks using various databases and literature searches.

steps.description: Data from the analysis of flash fractions were processed using UNIFI 1.9.4 software.
steps.searchable_summary: process UPLC-HR-MS data using UNIFI 1.9.4 software

steps.description: Selected peaks were dereplicated using MarinLit, ChemSpider, and Dictionary of Natural products, as well as extensive literature searches.
steps.searchable_summary: dereplicate selected peaks using MarinLit, ChemSpider, and literature searches

methods.description: This method describes the statistical analysis of metabolomics data using EZinfo and Progenesis QI software, including the creation of scores plot and s-plot.

steps.description: Statistical analysis of metabolomics data was done using EZinfo v.3.0.3.0 and Progenesis QI v.2.4 software for analysis of LC-MS data.
steps.searchable_summary: perform statistical analysis of metabolomics data using EZinfo and Progenesis QI

steps.description: Scores plot and s-plot were made using EZinfo.
steps.searchable_summary: create scores plot and s-plot using EZinfo
